title: Introduction
description:
Introduction

Introduction

The Epson RC+ 8.0 Option RC+ API enables you to use Visual Basic or any other language that supports .NET technology to run your robotic applications.  This gives you the power to create sophisticated user interfaces, use databases, and use third party products designed for use with .NET.

This gives you the power to create sophisticated user interfaces, use databases, and use .NET Framework or .NET6 designed for use with .NET.

A LabVIEW library is also included.

Only "Visual Basic" or Visual C# can be used for .NET6.

.NET6 is only available in Visual Studio 2022.
